title: Secrets, Provider Data Terms, Privacy, Retention, and Sensitive Uses · Language Clinic: Retention Deletion
summary: An API key appears in source, prompts contain personal records, free and paid data terms are confused, logs persist indefinitely, and a high-impact use launches without review. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the retention deletion increment in governed secret and agent-data lifecycle. Learners progress through prediction, explicit…
objectives: Implement purpose-limited retention, user and administrator deletion, cache and provider-state expiry, backup handling, legal holds, and proof of deletion limits.
Record current paid, unpaid, logging, sharing, abuse-monitoring, region, age, and sensitive-use terms and re-review them before release.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: agentpy-retention-deletion — Implement purpose-limited retention, user and administrator deletion, cache and provider-state expiry, backup handling, legal holds, and proof of deletion limits.
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-secrets-privacy-governance-3
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-secrets-privacy-governance-3.
# Case 5798: a keyboard and screen-reader interaction review.
# Operating constraint: every external effect requires explicit least-authority policy.
# Changed case: change one tool call, argument, authority, result, or failure and preserve correlation.
def worked_agentpy_secrets_privacy_governance_3(data_fields: int = 28, approved_fields: int = 12, rejected_fields: int = 16, redacted_logs: int = 28, leaked_secrets: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked3 = "worked3-3dekrow-5798"
    assert evidence_variant_worked3
    evidence_axes_worked3 = (
        "authorityworked3",
        "interaction5798",
        "tool3dekrow",
        "stateworked35798",
        "evaluation5798worked3",
        "recovery3dekrow5798",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked3)) == 6
    if data_fields < 1 or approved_fields < 0 or rejected_fields < 0:
        return False, data_fields, "privacy-field-count"
    if approved_fields + rejected_fields != data_fields:
        return False, approved_fields, "data-minimization"
    if redacted_logs != data_fields:
        return False, redacted_logs, "log-redaction"
    if leaked_secrets > 0:
        return False, leaked_secrets, "secret-leak"
    assert approved_fields + rejected_fields == data_fields and leaked_secrets == 0
    return True, approved_fields, "governed-agent-data"

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Build Retention Deletion evidence · Theory Retention Deletion
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: agentpy-retention-deletion-y8upom" that uses case 1109 to enforce secret custody, data minimization, provider terms, retention, deletion, regional and sensitive-use review, and redacted evidence. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not contact provider APIs, invoke Gemini models, import or claim native google-genai, google-adk, or Pydantic behavior, open sockets, read or write host files, use credentials, execute generated code, launch browsers, reach databases or telemetry backends, or claim live privacy, load, safety, cost, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, google-genai 2.11.0, google-adk 2.4.0, Pydantic 2.13.4, fixed provider fixtures, fake transports, controlled local services, disposable cloud projects, representative eval sets, accessibility, privacy and security review, load, canary, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

Evidence target: Safe AI agents and Python Build Retention Deletion evidence · Theory Retention Deletion.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Retention Deletion into observable performance evidence. For Safe AI agents and Python Build Retention Deletion evidence · Theory Retention Deletion, keep Retention Deletion connected to executable Python model, interaction, tool, policy, state, approval, evaluation, security, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-retention-deletion-y8upom
# Competency: agentpy-retention-deletion.
# Case 1109: a controlled support-operations rehearsal.
# Operating constraint: model output and tool arguments remain untrusted until validated.
# Changed case: change model capability, API version, schema, or provider state and revalidate the adapter.
def evidence_agentpy_retention_deletion_y8upom(data_fields: int = 28, approved_fields: int = 12, rejected_fields: int = 16, redacted_logs: int = 28, leaked_secrets: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_y8upom = "y8upom-mopu8y-1109"
    assert evidence_variant_y8upom
    evidence_axes_y8upom = (
        "authorityy8upom",
        "interaction1109",
        "toolmopu8y",
        "statey8upom1109",
        "evaluation1109y8upom",
        "recoverymopu8y1109",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_y8upom)) == 6
    if data_fields < 1 or approved_fields < 0 or rejected_fields < 0:
        return False, data_fields, "privacy-field-count"
    if approved_fields + rejected_fields != data_fields:
        return False, approved_fields, "data-minimization"
    if redacted_logs != data_fields:
        return False, redacted_logs, "log-redaction"
    if leaked_secrets > 0:
        return False, leaked_secrets, "secret-leak"
    assert approved_fields + rejected_fields == data_fields and leaked_secrets == 0
    return True, approved_fields, "governed-agent-data"
